# blackList

Daily-compiled domain blacklist threat registry for Pi-hole, AdGuard Home, and browser blockers. Filtered against whitelists to minimize false positives.

## Core Features
- Excludes the `"social"` category from the master list and core variants (lite, medium, high, adblock, nsfw).
- Pre-compiled alternates combine base filters with optional extensions (StevenBlack-style).
- Interactive dashboard displays lookup validation, categorizations, and monitoring feed statuses.

## Repository Structure
- [config.yaml](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/config.yaml): Upstream blocklist feed sources.
- [whitelist.txt](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/whitelist.txt): List of whitelisted domains to prevent false positives.
- [scripts/crawler.py](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/scripts/crawler.py): Crawler that concurrently downloads blocklist feeds and consolidates domains.
- [scripts/validator.py](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/scripts/validator.py): Validator that filters domains against syntax rules and whitelist, compiles lookup databases, and writes HTML variants.
- [index.html](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/index.html): Main web dashboard GUI.
- [script.js](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/script.js): Dynamic client-side dashboard controller.
- [style.css](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/style.css): Glassmorphism stylesheet for the dashboard site.
- [master/](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/master/): Consolidated clean domains list (domains.txt, hosts.txt, adblock.txt).
- [categories/](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/categories/): Clean domain lists separated by category.
- [variants/](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/variants/): Curated blocklist tiers.
- [alternates/](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/alternates/): StevenBlack-style alternate blocklists.
- [lookup/](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/lookup/): Sharded hex JSON database files for rapid lookup on the web dashboard.
- [stats.json](file:///home/who/Documents/AI-Coding/Github/blackList/stats.json): Compiled database and pipeline run statistics.
